data.name: PayPlus_DocumentPreview_Desc
data.value: Displays a PayPlus document preview from a PayPlus document record.

data.name: PayPlus_DocumentPreview_Host_Desc
data.value: Host field used to place the PayPlus document preview control on the form.

data.name: PayPlus_DocumentPreview_DocumentId_Desc
data.value: Optional PayPlus document row ID for custom pages. Bind to Param("recordId") when used in a custom page dialog.
